calendar.matters:
AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Greg Gomes, esq. (415-982-1300 x.6330) of Bay Area Legal Aid for Plaintiff/Moving party MELBA TYSON.
Laurie E. Sherwood, esq. (415-544-7123) of Walsworth WFBM, LLP for Defendant/opposing party San Francisco Housing Authority.
Court reporter: Beth E. Grant CSR #10943 (877-451-1580).

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Plaintiff requests Statement of Decision and to move Administrative Record into evidence. ARGUED re: reasonable accommodations request and decision of hearing officer regarding voucher extension. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER MELBA TYSON's AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate is Taken Under Submission. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Beth E. Grant CSR #10943 (877-451-1580). (D501)
